title: Project preparation
reasonable_ask: No external ask yet. Prepare the project calmly before public contact.
existing_workflow_checked: Project method, task board and launch workflow

title: Plain-English public documents
reasonable_ask: Ask one public body to make one document easier to understand or explain the plain-English standard it uses.

title: Decision ownership maps
reasonable_ask: Ask for a clearer explanation of who owns a decision or public process.

title: Honest consultation test
reasonable_ask: Ask a public body to say clearly what is fixed, open, constrained or undecided in a consultation.

title: Public-sector AI accountability
reasonable_ask: Ask one relevant body to explain how it records, governs or discloses AI or automated decision-support use.

title: How petitions actually work
reasonable_ask: Explain one lawful petition route clearly and test whether it points citizens to the right next step.

title: Do our votes count fairly?
reasonable_ask: Ask a representative or candidate to state their position on whether Westminster elections should use a more proportional voting system.
